# Design: Multi-Voice-Engine (Epic)

<!-- generated by @feature-intake — updated 2026-06-24 — source: docs/multi-voice-engine.md + UI mockup -->

## Problem & Intent

Scriptony braucht einen modularen Audio-Production-Layer für mehrstimmige Hörspiel-Szenen: Drehbuch → Charaktere → Stimmen → Regie pro Zeile → Takes → Mix. MVP 0.1 ist der **Core Hörspiel-Editor**, eingebettet in die **Structure Timeline / DAW-Shell** (nicht Dropdown- oder Manuskript-Ansicht).

## UI-Anker (bestätigt)

Integration in **`StructureTimelineEditor`** (`timelineview`):

| Mockup-Element | Bestehender Code | MVE ergänzt |
|----------------|------------------|-------------|
| Shot/Szene + DAW-Timeline | `StructureTimelineEditor`, Scene/Shot-Tracks | — |
| Audio-Dialog-Spur + Charakter | `StructureTimelineAudioLanes`, Dialog-Lanes | Line-Text am Clip |
| Mixer (Vol/Solo/Mute/Pan/FX) | `AudioClipLaneSidebar` → `TrackHeader` | — |
| Add Audio: Record / Upload / Generate | `AddAudioTimelineMenu` | Generate → Charakter-VoiceProfile |
| Wellenform + Text im Clip | `AudioTimelineSegment` | Dialogtext, LineDirection, Dirty |
| Characters unten | (Panel ausbauen) | Voice-Zuweisung, Preview-Satz |
| Enhance (ElevenLabs-artig) | — | Szene/Clip-Kontext + API |

**Nicht** primär: `AudioDropdownView` (Hierarchie-Liste), `NativeAudiobookView` (read-only Manuskript).

Referenz-Mockup: Nutzer-Screenshot 2026-06-24 (Structure Timeline mit Audio Dialog, Add Audio, Characters).

## Non-Goals (MVP 0.1)

- Voice Cloning, globale Voice-Library-Modal, Performance Reference (MVP 0.4–0.5)
- Render Line/Takes, Scene Mix Export (MVP 0.2–0.3)
- STT-Rückweg „Text aus generiertem Audio“ (MVP 0.2)
- Realtime, Telefonie, vollständige DAW-Neuentwicklung
- Paralleles `tickets/*.md` — neue Arbeit → GitHub Issues

## Assumptions

- Nutzer arbeitet in geöffnetem `.scriptony`-Projekt (local runtime).
- Lines sind **timeline-nativ**: an `AudioClip` / Szene-Lane gebunden, nicht in separatem Script-Tab.
- `AddAudioTimelineMenu` → Generate nutzt **VoiceProfile des Lane-Charakters**.
- Enhance: `POST /script/enhance` in **`scriptony-audio-story`** (nicht `scriptony-assistant`).
- Schema unter `src/lib/multi-voice-engine/` — keine TTS-Imports in Script/Schema-Schichten.

## Was im Repo schon da ist

- `src/components/structure/timeline/StructureTimelineEditor.tsx` — Haupt-Timeline
- `src/components/structure/timeline/tracks/StructureTimelineAudioLanes.tsx` — Audio-Spuren
- `src/components/timeline/audio/AddAudioTimelineMenu.tsx` — Record / Upload / Generate
- `src/components/timeline/audio/AudioClipLaneSidebar.tsx` — Mixer-Header
- `src/components/audio/AudioTimelineSegment.tsx` — Clip + Waveform + TTS
- `src/hooks/useTimelineAddAudio.ts` — Add-Audio-Flow
- `src/lib/types/audio.ts` — `CharacterVoiceAssignment`
- `src/components/audio/CharacterVoiceSelector.tsx` — Kokoro/local voices
- `functions/scriptony-audio-story/` — TTS, voices, clips
- `docs/multi-voice-engine.md` — PRD §21 MVP-Roadmap

## Decision

**Chosen:** Schema + Local persist → Timeline-UI (Lines + LineDirection + Dirty) → Character-Voice-Panel → Enhance-API. **5 GitHub Issues** für MVP 0.1.

**Why:** Mockup und laufende Timeline-Arbeit (T72/T73) sind der richtige Anker; vermeidet doppelte Audio-UI.

## Runtime matrix (MVP 0.1)

| Slice | Local desktop | Cloud session | Functions |
|-------|---------------|---------------|-----------|
| Schema/lib | ✅ | — | — |
| SQLite persist | ✅ | — | — |
| Timeline UI (lines + direction) | ✅ | — | — |
| Character voice panel | ✅ | optional TTS list | optional |
| Enhance | stub | ✅ | ✅ `/script/enhance` |

## Cross-Domain Sign-Off

| Domain | Status | Note |
|--------|--------|------|
| KISS | ✅ | 5 Issues; kein zweites Editor-UI |
| SOLID | ✅ | Schema ≠ TTS ≠ Timeline-View |
| DRY | ✅ | Reuse AddAudio, segments, adapter |
| Security | ⚠️ | Enhance guardrails; Consent später (0.4) |
| UI/UX | ✅ | Mockup = Structure Timeline |
| Scaling | ✅ | Takes/Jobs in 0.2 |
| Testability | ✅ | Zod + mapper tests |
| Maintainability | ✅ | `multi-voice-engine/` Modul |

## Implementation Sketch

```
src/lib/multi-voice-engine/
  schema/                    # Zod: Line, LineDirection, VoiceProfile
  script/                    # dirty flags, validation (no TTS)
src/backend/local/           # SQLite CRUD, clip↔line mapping
src/components/structure/timeline/   # Editor-Integration
src/components/timeline/audio/       # AudioTimelineSegment, ClipPopover
src/components/audio/                # CharacterVoicePanel (Timeline-Footer)
functions/scriptony-audio-story/routes/script-enhance.ts
```

- Estimated scope MVP 0.1: ~2000–3500 LOC across 5 issues
- Tests: Vitest schema + repository; verify-ticket per issue

## Resolved questions

- **UI-Platzierung:** Structure Timeline (`StructureTimelineEditor`), Dialog-Clips, Characters-Panel unten.
- **Enhance-Route:** `scriptony-audio-story`, nicht assistant.
- **Issue 3+5:** merged — LineDirection + Dirty im Timeline-Clip-Editor.

## Open Questions

- [ ] Line ↔ Clip: 1:1 `audioClipId` auf Line vs. embedded text field on `AudioClip`?
- [ ] VoiceProfile: eigene Tabelle vs. Erweiterung `CharacterVoiceAssignment`?

## Ready for /implement

NO — Issue-Entwurf `.qa/intake/multi-voice-engine-issues.md` zur finalen Review, dann Issues anlegen → `@ecc-runner`.
